seoTitle: Raglan vs Rainbow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Raglan and Rainbow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Raglan and Rainbow.
heading: Raglan vs Rainbow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Raglan, Victoria and Rainbow, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Raglan and Rainbow have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Raglan or Rainbow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Raglan has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Rainbow scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Raglan scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Rainbow scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Raglan or Rainbow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Raglan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
